name: ai-marketing-skills
description: Open-source AI-powered marketing skills platform enabling automation and enhancement across growth experiments, sales pipelines, content operations, outbound marketing, SEO, and finance processes.

inputs.name: marketing_data
inputs.description: Data related to marketing activities such as campaigns, sales leads, content topics, SEO keywords, financial figures, or outbound contact lists.

inputs.name: experiment_parameters
inputs.description: Configuration settings and hypotheses for growth experiments including test variables and target metrics.

inputs.name: content_brief
inputs.description: Input guidance or topics for generating marketing content or strategies.

inputs.name: sales_pipeline_data
inputs.description: Information about sales opportunities, lead stages, and customer interactions.

inputs.name: seo_keywords
inputs.description: Keyword list for SEO optimization and analysis.

inputs.name: finance_data
inputs.description: Financial inputs relevant for automation including budgets, expenses, or revenue figures.

outputs.name: growth_experiment_results
outputs.description: Analysis and outcomes of growth marketing experiments including performance metrics.

outputs.name: sales_pipeline_insights
outputs.description: Visualizations and summaries helping optimize sales processes and pipeline management.

outputs.name: automated_content
outputs.description: Generated marketing content such as blog posts, social media posts, or email templates.

outputs.name: outbound_campaigns
outputs.description: Created outbound marketing strategies and communication templates.

outputs.name: seo_optimization_suggestions
outputs.description: Recommendations for SEO improvements based on keyword and content analysis.

outputs.name: finance_automation_outputs
outputs.description: Automated finance-related actions such as budgeting alerts or expense tracking reports.

patterns: Data-driven growth experiment design and analysis
Sales pipeline automation and insights extraction
Automated outbound messaging and campaign management
Finance process automation integrated with marketing activities
steps: Collect and ingest relevant marketing, sales, SEO, and finance data inputs.
Configure experiment parameters and campaign goals for growth and outbound marketing.
Use AI models to generate marketing content and optimize SEO based on inputs.
Analyze sales pipeline data to identify bottlenecks and recommend improvements.
Automate finance-related processes such as budgeting and expense tracking in marketing workflows.
Generate reports, dashboards, and campaign plans for decision-making and execution.
use_cases: Automating content production for social media and blogs to drive engagement.
Running and analyzing growth experiments to improve conversion rates.
Managing and optimizing sales pipelines with AI insights.
Planning and executing outbound marketing campaigns efficiently.
Improving website ranking through automated SEO recommendations.
Streamlining financial operations related to marketing budgets and expenditures.

prompt_templates.name: generate_marketing_content
prompt_templates.template: Create a {content_type} focused on {topic} that appeals to {target_audience} with a tone that is {tone}.

prompt_templates.name: growth_experiment_setup
prompt_templates.template: Design a growth experiment with goal: {goal_description} and variables: {variables_list}. Provide the expected metrics to track.

prompt_templates.name: sales_pipeline_optimization
prompt_templates.template: Analyze this sales pipeline data: {sales_pipeline_data}. Recommend actions to improve closing rates and sales velocity.

prompt_templates.name: outbound_campaign_message
prompt_templates.template: Draft an outbound marketing message targeting {audience_segment} promoting {product_or_service} with a focus on {key_benefit}.

prompt_templates.name: seo_recommendations
prompt_templates.template: Based on these keywords: {seo_keywords} and existing content: {content_summary}, suggest SEO optimizations to increase organic traffic.

prompt_templates.name: finance_automation_action
prompt_templates.template: Given finance inputs: {finance_data}, generate automation steps or alerts to manage marketing budget effectively.
